title: Launch Day
description: SLS launches from Kennedy Space Center Pad 39B, carrying Orion with 4 astronauts. After reaching orbit, ICPS performs the TLI burn to send Orion toward the Moon.
events: TLI burn — Orion leaves Earth orbit

title: Outbound — Leaving Earth
description: Orion separates from ICPS, deploys solar arrays. Crew performs initial systems checks and settles into the spacecraft for the long coast to the Moon.

title: Outbound — Deep Space
description: Systems checkout continues. Crew tests Orion's life support, communication systems, and navigation. First images of Earth from deep space.

title: Outbound — Midcourse
description: Possible midcourse correction burn. Crew continues adapting to the deep space environment. Distance from Earth: ~200,000 km.

title: Outbound — Approaching the Moon
description: Orion enters the lunar sphere of influence. The Moon's gravity begins to dominate. Final preparations for lunar flyby.

title: Lunar Approach
description: Orion approaches the Moon, passing behind the far side. Brief loss of signal as the spacecraft is occulted by the Moon. The crew sees the lunar far side up close.

title: Farthest Point — Beyond the Moon
description: Orion reaches its farthest point from Earth: ~392,000 km, surpassing 7,600 km beyond the Moon. The crew sets a new distance record, passing Apollo 13's 400,171 km mark from Earth.

title: Return — Heading Home
description: Return trajectory established. Orion begins the long coast back to Earth. Crew conducts additional systems tests for the return leg.

title: Return — Midway Home
description: Continued return coast. Crew prepares for re-entry procedures. Final deep space activities before approaching Earth.

title: Return — Final Approach
description: Orion approaches Earth. Service module separation. Heat shield orientation. The crew prepares for the most critical phase: re-entry at 40,000 km/h.

title: Splashdown
description: Orion splashes down in the Pacific Ocean. USS Portland recovery ship retrieves the crew module. The Artemis II crew returns to Earth as heroes who opened the door back to the Moon.
events: First humans beyond LEO in 53+ years — safely home
